title: License inventory
description: Committed snapshot of every third-party Python dependency and every vendored LICENSE file in the repo, with the SPDX identifier each carries. audit_license_inventory.py rebuilds this snapshot from importlib.metadata + the working tree and fails CI if it drifts.

$schema.description: Repo-relative path to this schema file (for editor validation).

version.description: Semver of the release this inventory was captured against. Mirrors VERSION at the time of capture.

captured_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at the moment audit_license_inventory.py --write was last run.

git_head.description: Full 40-char SHA of the HEAD commit when the inventory was captured. Reviewers can replay the same enumeration against the same source.

repo_license.description: License the repository itself ships under. Pulled from the top-level LICENSE file + pyproject.toml's [project].license declaration.

file.description: Repo-relative path to the LICENSE file the SPDX was inferred from.

allowlist.description: Sorted list of SPDX identifiers that audit_license_inventory.py treats as compatible with this repo's MIT licence. Anything outside this list fails CI; broadening the list requires legal sign-off in the same PR.

python_packages.description: Every Python distribution declared in pyproject.toml ([project].dependencies + every optional-dependencies extra) for the root package and the MCP package, in sorted order. The same package appearing in both projects is reported once with both consumers listed.

vendored_licenses.description: Every LICENSE-style file the repo ships outside the top-level LICENSE. Catches third-party content vendored into splunk-apps/, templates/, or wherever else upstream code lives in-tree.

name.description: Distribution name as it appears on PyPI (lowercase, hyphenated).

spdx.description: Best-effort SPDX identifier extracted from the dist-info metadata. Resolution order: License-Expression -> License (parsed against an SPDX alias table) -> Trove classifier (License :: OSI Approved :: ...) -> the literal string "UNKNOWN" if every probe fails.

license_source.description: Which metadata field the SPDX was extracted from. One of: license-expression, license, classifier, unknown.

consumers.description: Which of the repo's pyproject.toml files declare this dependency. Sorted; duplicates collapsed.

extras.description: Which dependency group each consumer pulls this package through. Sorted; duplicates collapsed. Example: ["audits", "test"] means the package is in both extras for at least one consumer.

version_constraint.description: Lower-bound version constraint as declared in pyproject.toml (PEP 440 specifier, e.g. ">=4.21"). Empty if no constraint was declared.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the LICENSE file.

spdx.description: SPDX identifier inferred from the file header (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0).

subject.description: Short human-readable description of what code/content the LICENSE covers (e.g. "splunk-uc-recommender Splunk app vendored verbatim").
